trigger: ASR failure – bot could not transcribe learner speech and did not attempt to resolve
evidence_summary: In turn 9, the bot indicates a transcription failure with 'Trascrizione non disponibile', but does not attempt to resolve the issue. In turn 10, the bot moves on to a new topic without addressing the previous communication trouble, abandoning the repair.

The bot's utterance in turn 12 is incomplete ('Absolutely, that'). The bot immediately self-corrects and completes its thought in turn 13 ('Definitely, dividing the work evenly...'), and the learner's subsequent (unlisted) turn shows no confusion, indicating the trouble was resolved.
